exercises.name: Bodyweight Incline Side Plank
instructions: Adopt the starting position with proper body alignment.
Pre-engage the abs before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Drop Jump Squat
instructions: Adopt the starting position with proper body alignment.
Perform a brief dip to load tension.
Execute the movement explosively and land under control.
Land softly absorbing with legs and core, then chain the next rep.

exercises.name: Weighted Stretch Lunge

Return slowly to the starting position and repeat if desired.
